statement: In every magma, Equation 788 (`x = y * (z * ((z * w) * z))`) implies Equation 394 (`x * y = (z * x) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0688
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op z (op (op z w) z)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op z x) x)
